title: Google Translated 200x
description: A simple resource pack for fun that google translates textures 200x. This pack will eb updated a lot as I don't know how I got the pack to actually work. PLEASE SOMEONE TELL ME
body:
A resource pack that google translates textures 200 times








WILL HAVE MANY FUTURE UPDATES

Upcoming Updates:
2.0
Birch Forest Update

-Google Translates the Birch Forest 200x

2.1
1.21.5 Wildflowers

-Google Translates the Wildflowers, Leaves, and other ambience added in 1.21.5

3.0
Taiga
-Google Translates the Taiga 200x (Some things from the Snowy Taiga are there though)

3.1
Ghast (1.21.6)
-Google translates Harnesses, Happy Ghasts, Dried Ghasts, and the Tears music disc as well as normal ghasts, ans ghast tears

3.1.1
Movie (1.21.7)
-Google translates the Lava Chicken Music Disc and the Dennis Painting

Maybe Soon:
Cherry Blossom
Mangrove
Classic
Indev/Infdev
Flowers
